title: Yeast 'n Feast
description: A mod centered around brewing Mead and crafting food items that range from elaborate dishes to delicious Jams.
body:
![YeastnFeastLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13a1505d7d052b318b4e102eae3ebdd37ccbefdd_0.webp) [![Join Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1064760109760253952?color=brightgreen&label=Discord)](https://discord.gg/fcbH6BqW3X) [![Curseforge Downloads](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/full_1221962_downloads.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yeast-n-feast) ### About **Yeast 'n Feast** is a flavorful Minecraft mod that brings tavern-style brewing and rustic feasting into your world. Build your own cozy tavern filled with handcrafted drinks, hearty meals, and a warm, inviting atmosphere. At the core of the mod is the **Keg**, a new block that allows you to brew custom meads by combining ingredients such as honey, fruits, and yeast. You can also craft jam from wild berries gathered during your travels. Discover new crops like **Barley**, **Mint**, and **Garlic**, and prepare dishes including **Molasses Bread**, **Berry Rolls**, and grand feast platters. For those with a sweet tooth, treats like **Elderberry Pie** and **Maple-Glazed Rabbit** await. The mod also adds new berries, a **Maple Tree**, and unique status effects: * **Vigorous** – Provides bonus hearts and improved healing. * **Overfed** – Slows the loss of saturation. Whether you’re a farmer, a brewer, or a roleplay tavernkeeper, _Yeast 'n Feast_ is your recipe for immersive culinary adventures. ### Showcases:
Spoiler
--- ### **Additional Information** 🛠️ **Development Status** This mod is a **work in progress**, with more features planned for future updates. As we continue learning **coding, modeling, and texturing**, we invite you to follow our journey and share feedback! 📦 **Modpack/Addon Usage** You’re welcome to include Yeast 'n Feast in your modpacks, or make addons with it. Enjoy!
